description.en: List all deployments for a specific environment. Deployments represent the process of shipping code.
description.de: Listet alle Deployments für eine bestimmte Umgebung auf. Deployments repräsentieren den Prozess des Veröffentlichens von Code.
description.es: List all deployments for a specific environment. Deployments represent the process of shipping code.
description.fr: List all deployments for a specific environment. Deployments represent the process of shipping code.
description.ro: List all deployments for a specific environment. Deployments represent the process of shipping code.
description.it: List all deployments for a specific environment. Deployments represent the process of shipping code.

vars.API_KEY: env:LARAVEL_CLOUD_TOKEN|Get your API token from Organization Settings in Laravel Cloud

description.en: The ID or slug of the environment.
description.es: The ID or slug of the environment.
description.fr: The ID or slug of the environment.
description.ro: The ID or slug of the environment.
description.it: The ID or slug of the environment.

output.DEPLOYMENTS: transform:(out) => { return Array.isArray(out.data) ? out.data.map(item => ({ id: item.id, status: item.attributes.status, commit_hash: item.attributes.commit_hash, commit_message: item.attributes.commit_message, started_at: item.attributes.started_at, finished_at: item.attributes.finished_at })) : []; }
